occurrence_sentence: Intel Collaborates with Argonne National Laboratory, DOE in Q-NEXT Quantum Computing Research

Intel recently announced that it is among the leading U.S. quantum technology companies included in Q-NEXT, one of five new national quantum research centers established by the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) and the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE).

Intel recently announced that it is among the leading U.S. quantum technology companies included in Q-NEXT, one of five new national quantum research centers established by the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) and the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE).

interaction_phrase: created five new quantum information science research centers
occurrence_sentence: To speed the discovery and development in this promising emerging field of computing, the DOE and the OSTP have created five new quantum information science research centers across the country, with Q-NEXT being one of them.

interaction_phrase: partnership with Argonne National Laboratory on Q-NEXT
occurrence_sentence: "Advancing quantum practicality will be a team sport across the ecosystem, and our partnership with Argonne National Laboratory on Q-NEXT will enable us to bring our unique areas of expertise to this cross-industry effort to drive meaningful progress in the field," said James Clarke, director of Quantum Hardware, Intel.
"We are excited to have Intel's expertise and partnership, along with numerous technology leaders, as part of the new Q-NEXT center."
